Notification Test Fixture

NOTIF-001: Permission Handling

Current permission: checking...

Tests: permission grant/deny based on per-site toggle.

NOTIF-002: Notification Display

Tests: JS Notification constructor → native notification bridge.

NOTIF-003: Tap Navigation

Tests: tapping the notification should bring you back to this site. After sending, switch to another site or put app in background, then tap the notification.

NOTIF-005: Background Active

Tests: enable "background active" for this site, tap the button, then put the app in background. You should receive 3 notifications over 15 seconds.

Periodic Notifications

Count: 0 | Status: stopped

Fires a notification every 60 seconds. Use to test background polling — enable backgroundPoll, start periodic, then background the app.

Edge Cases

Tests: edge cases for robustness.

Event Log
